description: Initial screen state: Askable session page with screen sharing instructions.
page_title: Askable Sessions
frame_description: Dark screen with white text 'Please click the screen sharing button that appears, and choose the option to share this window.' Participant video feed in top right.

description: Text updates to 'Perfect!'
frame_description: The central text on the dark screen changes to 'Perfect!'

description: Task instructions appear on screen.
frame_description: A block of text appears describing the task: booking a return domestic flight within Australia using Flight Centre.

description: 'Please think aloud...' instruction appears.
frame_description: New text appears below the task instructions: 'Please think aloud as you work through this...'

description: Text updates to 'I'm going to open the website...'
frame_description: The instructional text is replaced by 'I'm going to open the website in your browser now...'

description: 'Open' button appears.
frame_description: A grey button with the text 'Open' and an external link icon appears in the center of the screen.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button at the moment of the click.

description: Navigation to Flight Centre homepage.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Book Flights, Holidays & More
frame_description: A new browser tab opens and loads the Flight Centre website.

description: Flight Centre homepage finishes loading.
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is fully rendered, showing a red header and a 'UK & EUROPE SALE' banner.

description: Qantas flights sale banner appears.
frame_description: A large banner for 'QANTAS FLIGHTS SALE' appears in the middle of the page.

description: 'Travel dates' calendar modal appears.
frame_description: A modal window titled 'Travel dates' with a calendar view appears over the homepage.

description: User hovers over the close button (X) on the advertisement overlay.
User clicks the close button (X) to dismiss the advertisement overlay.
Advertisement overlay closes, revealing the calendar.
frame_description: The advertisement overlay is gone, and the February and March 2026 calendars are fully visible.

description: User hovers over February 18th in the calendar.
User selects February 18th in the calendar.
User selects February 21st in the calendar.
User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm date selection.
Date picker modal closes, and selected dates are updated in the search form.
frame_description: The homepage is visible again, with 'Wed, 18 Feb - Sat, 21 Feb' shown in the date field of the search bar.

description: User hovers over the 'Where to?' destination input field.
User clicks the 'Where to?' destination input field.
Destination suggestion dropdown appears.
frame_description: A dropdown menu has appeared below the 'Where to?' field, listing popular cities like Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane.

description: User hovers over 'Melbourne, Australia' in the destination suggestions.
User selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the destination suggestions.
Destination dropdown closes, and 'Melbourne, Australia' is set in the search field.
frame_description: The search bar now shows 'Melbourne, Australia' in the destination field.

description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button.
Navigation to the flight search results page begins.
frame_description: The screen goes white as the new page begins to load.

description: Loading screen for flight search results is displayed.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia
frame_description: A loading screen is visible with the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and a progress spinner.

description: Search results for Sydney to Melbourne are displayed.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals | Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The search results page is fully loaded, showing 'Select Departing Flight' and a list of available flights.

description: User hovers over the price button for the Qantas flight QF401.
User clicks the price button to expand fare options.
Fare types 'Red Edeal' and 'Economy Flex' are displayed below the flight row.
frame_description: The flight row has expanded to reveal two columns with different fare rules and prices.

description: User selects the 'Red Edeal' fare for $307.
Selection is confirmed with a green checkmark appearing on the button.
frame_description: The 'SELECT' button for the $307 fare now shows a green checkmark.

description: Loading overlay appears with 'Good choice!' message and a spinner.
frame_description: A white overlay with the text 'Good choice!' and a blue loading spinner covers the results.

description: Page transitions to return flight selection.
'Select Return Flight' results are displayed.
frame_description: The header now reads 'Select Return Flight' and shows flights from Melbourne to Sydney.

description: User hovers over the 'CHANGE' link next to the selected departing flight summary.
User scrolls down the search results page to explore available flights.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: Search results page for flights from Melbourne to Sydney.

description: User hovers over the sort dropdown menu.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: Search results page with the sort dropdown highlighted by the cursor.

description: User hovers over the Virgin Australia flight departing at 6:00 AM.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: Search results page with the cursor over the 6:00 AM Virgin Australia flight row.

description: User selects the Virgin Australia flight departing at 6:00 AM.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: The flight row is clicked, initiating an expansion of the row.

description: The flight row expands to display fare types: Lite, Choice, and Flex.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: The UI updates to show the fare options for the selected flight.

description: User hovers over the 'Lite' fare option card.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Lite' fare details.

description: User hovers back over the 'Lite' fare option card.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: The cursor returns to the 'Lite' fare card.

description: User selects the 'Lite' fare option.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: The 'SELECT' button under the 'Lite' fare is clicked.

description: The 'SELECT' button changes to a green 'SELECTED' state.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: The button visual state updates to green.

description: A loading overlay with the text 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' appears.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: A pink loading overlay covers the screen.

description: The page navigates to the 'Review trip' summary page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page is displayed with flight details and price summary.

description: User scrolls down the 'Review trip' page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | #1 for Travel
frame_description: The user scrolls to see the price summary on the right side of the page.

description: The flight details sections for both departing and returning flights expand to show more information.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page showing expanded flight details for Qantas and Virgin Australia flights.

description: User scrolls down the page to view the 'Add-ons' and 'Baggage' sections.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The page scrolls down, revealing the 'Add-ons' section and baggage information.

description: User scrolls further down to the 'Seats' section.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The 'Seats' section becomes visible at the bottom of the screen.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'SELECT SEATS' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue 'SELECT SEATS' button in the Seats section.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT SEATS' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The 'SELECT SEATS' button is activated.

description: A loading spinner appears as the seat selection interface is being prepared.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The screen shows a 'Loading seat selector' message with a blue progress spinner.

description: The seat map for Flight 1 (SYD -> MEL) appears on the screen.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The seat selection interface is now visible, showing the aircraft layout and available seats.

description: Cursor hovers over seat 5E on the seat map.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over seat 5E in the seat map.

description: User clicks on seat 5E.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: Seat 5E is clicked on the seat map.

description: A seat confirmation popup appears for seat 5E.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: A small modal window is displayed over the seat map, showing details for seat 5E.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the popup.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the modal.

description: User clicks the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The 'CONFIRM SEAT' button is clicked.

description: The confirmation popup closes and seat 5E is marked as selected on the map.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The seat map is visible again, with seat 5E highlighted in green.

description: User pauses to review the seat map after confirming their selection.
frame_description: The user is looking at the seat map with the selected seat highlighted.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'DONE' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'DONE' button in the bottom right corner.

description: Click on the 'DONE' button to complete seat selection for the flight.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'DONE' button at the bottom right of the seat selection section.

description: The seat selection interface closes.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The seat selection overlay disappears, revealing the main page.

description: User scrolls down the page to view the 'Online Captain's Pack' and 'CONTINUE' button.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'CONTINUE' button.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page.

description: Click on the 'CONTINUE' button.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The 'CONTINUE' button is clicked, and the page begins to transition.

description: Navigation to the passenger details page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The URL in the address bar changes to the passenger details page.

description: Loading overlay with 'Thanks for confirming your flights' message appears.
frame_description: A white overlay with a loading spinner and the text 'Thanks for confirming your flights' is visible.

description: Passenger details page starts loading with skeleton screens.
frame_description: The page layout for passenger details is visible, but content is still loading, shown by gray placeholder boxes.

description: Passenger details form and price summary are fully rendered.
frame_description: The passenger details form is visible, and the price summary panel on the right shows the total booking cost.

description: Passenger details page is fully loaded and ready for input.
frame_description: The complete passenger details page is displayed, including the form and the updated price summary.
